use_cases: Visualizing activity intensity patterns across time periods like hours, days, or weeks
Displaying contribution or engagement metrics with color-coded intensity levels
Comparing metric trends with inline trend indicators and percentage changes
Creating dashboard-ready data visualizations with animated count-up statistics
Building calendar-style activity grids commonly seen in analytics and productivity tools
ai_summary: A Reaviz-powered heatmap visualization component that displays data intensity patterns across a grid with supporting metrics. Features animated count-up statistics, color-coded trend indicators, and gradient-based color schemes from the Reaviz library. Designed for dashboards showing activity patterns, contribution histories, or engagement metrics across time dimensions.
